summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Qaivid 2.0 iteration 2 features. Backend APIs 92% success rate (48/52 tests passed). Frontend UI 100% success rate - all 7 pipeline tabs working, References panel with Characters/Environments tabs functional, Continuity panel accessible, model target selector present.

minor_bugs.issue: Test logic expects JSON response but endpoints return plain text/CSV
minor_bugs.impact: Test failures only - endpoints work correctly

test_logic_issues.issue: Test expected 400 status but got 200 with valid data
test_logic_issues.impact: False negative in test - endpoint actually works correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/models returns 11 model configs (generic, midjourney, dall-e, flux, sdxl, runway, kling, wan_2_6, veo, pika, stable-diffusion)
Frontend: 7-tab pipeline navigation (input, interpret, references, scenes, shots, prompts, continuity)
Frontend: References panel with Characters and Environments tabs
Frontend: Add character form accessible and functional
Frontend: Add environment form accessible and functional
Frontend: Continuity panel shows empty state correctly
Core pipeline: Project CRUD, input parsing, AI interpretation, scenes, shots, prompts all working
AI interpretation with real GPT-5.2 call (~10-20 seconds) successful
Pre-LLM enrichment and pacing profiles integrated
Model adapter system with 11 models functional
